heading: Signature Workouts

workouts.name: Outcrop Circuit
workouts.desc: Stairs or step ups, carries, crawls, and scan freezes. Repeatable and dense.

workouts.name: Bolt Ladder
workouts.desc: Every two minutes: burst, scramble, hold. High quality speed and power.

workouts.name: Colony Session
workouts.desc: Partner switches with carries and isometrics. Social, sweaty, and scalable.

challengeBody: A simple benchmark event: 6 rounds of scramble, haul, and bolt work. Track time to completion and keep movement quality clean.
